proof: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup, T1: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) } = is_add_group_hom[T0, T1](x0) }[Complex, Real](complex_re_fn)
let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k0: Complex) { complex_re_fn(w0 + k0) != complex_re_fn(w0) + complex_re_fn(k0) } }
let w1: Complex satisfy { complex_re_fn(w0 + w1) != complex_re_fn(w0) + complex_re_fn(w1) }
let w2: Complex satisfy { complex_re_fn(w0 + w2) != complex_re_fn(w0) + complex_re_fn(w2) }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { complex_re_fn(x0) + complex_re_fn(x1) = complex_re_fn(x0 + x1) }(w0, w2)

let w2: Complex satisfy { complex_im_fn(w0 + w2) != complex_im_fn(w0) + complex_im_fn(w2) }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { complex_im_fn(x0) + complex_im_fn(x1) = complex_im_fn(x0 + x1) }(w0, w2)

goal: exists(k0: AddGroupHom[Complex, Real]) { AddGroupHom.new[Complex, Real](complex_re_fn) = Option.some(k0) }
